title: Vanilla Clarity+
description: Smooth, clean, and optimized Minecraft. Enjoy vanilla gameplay with subtle improvements like zoom, clean water, and visual tweaks for a sharper, more immersive world.
body:
Vanilla Clarity+ is a carefully curated, vanilla-based modpack designed to enhance Minecraft’s core experience without overcomplicating it. It focuses on performance optimization, visual improvements, and subtle quality-of-life tweaks.

Key features include:

Optimized gameplay for smoother performance

Visual enhancements like clean water and improved gamma

Convenience mods such as zoom and minor tweaks

Maintains the classic vanilla feel you love

Whether you’re exploring, building, or surviving, Vanilla Clarity+ makes your world look better, run faster, and feel more immersive—perfect for players who want a refined, polished vanilla experience without unnecessary complexity.

For the best experience use Fabric most mod don't support Forge

Enjoy!
